items.title: Wound Closure Devices Market Insights, Competitive Landscape and Market Forecast to 2030
items.author: Globe Newswire
items.description: The global wound closure devices market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 7.4% from 2024 to 2030, driven by the rising incidence of chronic and acute wounds, increasing surgical procedures, and new product launches. North America is expected to dominate the market during the forecast period.
